signIn.headline: Sign in to Sporlo HQ
signIn.notAuthorized: This account isn't a Sporlo HQ user. Sign in with a super_admin account.
signIn.instructionsTitle: How do I become a super_admin?
signIn.instructionsBody: Run the SQL snippet in your Supabase project to promote your user. Details in packages/db/README.md.
